name: Legal Marketing
description: Public marketing landing surface for a legal research platform with hero, feature grid, testimonials, and final call to action.

page_briefs.home: Marketing landing page for a legal research platform. Brand hero anchors the top with a headline positioning the product against Westlaw and Lexis, a subheadline emphasizing AI-powered citation checking, and dual CTAs for trial and demo. Below, a features grid spotlights case law search, citation graphs, memo drafting, and contract review. Next, a testimonials band carries quotes from practicing attorneys and partners. The page closes with a full-width cta-section prompting visitors to start a free trial.
